Title: Analyst
Description:
We’re working with a leading residential property developer in Dublin to hire an Analyst to join a high-impact, commercially focused team.




This is a unique opportunity for someone who enjoys working behind the scenes to shape senior-level decision-making. You’ll play a key role in producing the reports, analysis, and presentations that inform how the business evaluates its developments — past, present, and future.




The role is not client-facing but offers significant exposure to senior leadership and multiple functions across the organisation, including development, finance, and commercial teams.




The Role




Produce high-quality executive reports providing insights across completed, live, and pipeline developments
Deliver monthly live site updates, tracking performance, risks, and key milestones
Maintain and continuously improve a master tracker of all developments across the business
Support pipeline reporting on prospective sites and future opportunities
Conduct scenario analysis to support strategic planning and investment decisions
Compile key project reports highlighting priority developments
Create polished presentations for senior leadership to deliver to internal stakeholders and external partners
Ensure all reporting is accurate, consistent, and clearly structured




The Person




2–5 years’ experience in real estate, property, or a related analytical role
Strong Excel skills and experience with Power BI or similar tools
Solid understanding of the property development lifecycle
Highly detail-oriented with strong data management capabilities
Organised, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple workstreams
Strong written and presentation skills




Why Apply?




High visibility role with direct exposure to senior decision-makers
Broad insight into a full development pipeline
Opportunity to work cross-functionally in a leading Irish business
Strong platform for career progression in real estate or strategic roles




To discuss in confidence, contact Caroline via cogrady@elevatepartners.ie or apply directly via the link provided.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?




Somos una compañía tecnológica especializada en Inteligencia Artificial, IA Generativa, Analytics, Gobierno del Dato, Cloud y arquitecturas Event Driven, pero sobre todo somos un equipo con conocimiento, criterio y muchas ganas de hacer las cosas bien.

Trabajamos con talento altamente especializado, esté donde esté, y apostamos por una forma de crecer basada en la confianza, la autonomía y la participación. Nos mueve la excelencia tecnológica, la orientación a negocio y el sentido común, pero también el entusiasmo, la creatividad y la convicción de que la tecnología necesita alma, propósito y personas capaces de convertir la complejidad en soluciones reales.




¿Qué buscamos?

Buscamos a un/a Data Analyst con 1-3 años de experiencia profesional desarrollando Dashboards en Tableau con una fuerte orientación a la toma de decisiones de negocio para incorporarse a un proyecto de alto impacto en el sector retail.




Experiencia con SQL: capacidad para navegar con los datos usando el lenguaje SQL y así tener una visión descriptiva y realizar análisis sobre estos.
Experiencia con Tableau en entornos reales.
Experiencia en comunicación con áreas de negocio, trasladando necesidades identificadas por estas áreas a Dashboards.
Habilidades analíticas y de resolución de problemas, te encanta resolver problemas complejos y analizar datos.
Nivel de inglés profesional.




¿Cómo será tu día a día?




Transformarás los datos de clientes en soluciones visuales e intuitivas a través de Tableau, facilitando la toma de decisiones estratégicas.
Promoverás a partir de tus entregables que los equipos de negocio extraigan insights accionables de alto valor de forma ágil.
Llevarás a cabo la toma de requerimientos de los clientes.




¿Qué ofrecemos?

Pertenecer a una empresa a la vanguardia tecnológica y centrado en las Personas, ponemos al trabajador en el centro de todo lo que hacemos. Creemos en una cultura horizontal, sin egos, en un entorno donde se valoran tanto las ideas como las personas.

Contrato indefinido y salario de entre 28.000 y 32.000 euros brutos/año de entrada, ajustado según tu experiencia. También tendrás a tu disposición un plan de formación especializado, participación en la propiedad y los beneficios de Mática: Wetaca gratuito en la oficina dos días a la semana, horario flexible con facilidades para trabajar desde donde quieras, seguro de salud, retribución flexible con Cobee, además de las vacaciones habituales, ofrecemos una semana extra en Navidad y tres días adicionales en Semana Santa. También recibirás un divertido Welcome Kit con portátil (podrás escoger entre varios modelos Mac o Windows), móvil, botella personalizada, auriculares bluetooth y golosinas.




Cuando estés en nuestra oficina, en el centro de Barcelona o Madrid, la fruta, los cafés y los refrescos corren a cuenta de Mática. ¡Ah! Y si eres amante de los animales, te gustará saber esto: ¡nuestras oficinas son Pet-friendly!




Si te interesa, escríbenos por LinkedIn o envía tu CV a seleccion@maticapartners.com




Do you want to be Mática?




Be Mática!

Title: Data Analyst H/F
Description:
💡 OVENTI Consulting, cabinet de conseil en Data et Intelligence Artificielle qui allie expertise technique de pointe, vision stratégique et accompagnement sur mesure. Nous couvrons tout le cycle de vie des projets Data/IA, de la stratégie à l'implémentation de solutions personnalisées (ML, BI, automatisation intelligente).

Nos équipes, issues des meilleures écoles, s'intègrent chez nos clients ou opèrent depuis notre LAB interne, véritable foyer d’innovation. Chez Oventi, nous privilégions le "sur mesure" et l'innovation concrète. Chaque collaborateur est accompagné, formé et suivi pour garantir une culture d'excellence et un impact réel.




🧑 💻 Pourquoi ce rôle est clé ?

En tant que Data Analyst, vous occuperez un rôle stratégique au niveau de la data, de la business intelligence et de l'intelligence artificielle. Votre mission principale sera de transformer la donnée en leviers d'action concrets pour les équipes métiers, en consolidant le pilotage analytique et en intégrant des solutions d'IA pour affiner la prise de décision.




🎯 Vos missions au quotidien :

Pilotage de la performance :

Assurer un rôle de pilotage data et analytique complet, en définissant et en suivant les indicateurs de performance clés (KPI) pour le business.




Définition de stratégies :

Contribuer activement à la définition des stratégies, notamment en matière de merchandising et de négociation, en fournissant des analyses et des recommandations basées sur les données.




Optimisation de l'écosystème de reporting :

Gérer et rationaliser l'ensemble des tableaux de bord existants. L'objectif est de réduire le nombre de dashboards pour aboutir à une constellation d'outils plus efficaces et pertinents.




Développement d'outils analytiques :

Concevoir et mettre en place des outils de reporting stratégiques, tels qu'un Revenue Performance Dashboard, pour offrir une vision claire et consolidée de la performance financière.




Analyse avancée assistée par l'IA :

Mener des analyses complexes et des raisonnements "au cas d'usage" en exploitant des technologies d'Intelligence Artificielle. Utiliser l'IA comme un levier pour explorer les données et formuler des hypothèses d'action.







🧩 Stack technique :

Langages : Python, SQL
Bases de données : BigQuery
Outils de Business Intelligence & Visualisation : Looker, Tableau
Formats de données : CSV, JSON, Avro
Outils de gestion projet : Jira, Confluence




🧩 Vous êtes la personne idéale si :

5 ans d'expérience en tant que Data Analyst.
Diplômé d'un master ou d'une école d'ingénieur avec une spécialisation en Data Analyse, intelligence artificielle ou data science.
Aisance relationnelle, esprit collaboratif et appétence pour l'amélioration continue.




🌟 Pourquoi rejoindre OVENTI ?

Rejoindre Oventi, c'est choisir une aventure professionnelle unique :




✔️Une structure à taille humaine : Favorisant l'échange, l'autonomie et l'innovation, où votre impact est direct et visible.

✔️Des missions à forte valeur ajoutée : Dans des secteurs variés, avec une approche "sur mesure" où nos solutions ont des impacts importants chez nos clients.

✔️Une culture d’excellence technique : Avec un réel accompagnement de carrière et un suivi personnalisé.

✔️Une équipe passionnée et engagée : Des ingénieurs recrutés avec soin, formés en continu, et investis sur le long terme.

✔️L’agilité d’une startup, la rigueur d’un cabinet expert : Le meilleur des deux mondes pour une expérience enrichissante.

✔️Des missions à impact, visibles et valorisantes : Où vous aurez un impact réel sur les décisions métiers et la valeur business générée.




📍 Localisation : Paris (75002) avec 2-3 jours de télétravail hebdomadaire

💶 Rémunération : A discuter selon vos prétentions

🗓️ Démarrage : ASAP

Title: Data analyst
Description:
Únete a Amaris Consulting y participa en iniciativas data-driven que impactan a millones de usuarias de moda en todo el mundo. Formarás parte de un grupo internacional, trabajando implant (FTE) en el equipo de Ecommerce en un entorno que valora la innovación, la autonomía y el talento, utilizando un stack de datos real y de última generación.




🎯 Tu Misión & Impacto




Como Data analyst te incorporarás al equipo de Ecommerce para transformar datos en insights accionables, modelos analíticos y recomendaciones estratégicas que impulsen la captación, conversión, venta y retención de clientas, así como la reducción de devoluciones.




Trabajarás mano a mano con stakeholders de negocio digital, CRM, paid media y tecnología, asegurando que las decisiones clave se basen en datos y contribuyendo directamente al crecimiento del canal online.




🛠 Responsabilidades




Analizar datos de clientes y comportamiento digital para mejorar:Captación, conversión, venta, fidelización y devoluciones.
Diseñar, crear y mantener dashboards y reporting en Power BI para los equipos de Ecommerce y negocio.
Definir y hacer seguimiento de KPIs clave de Ecommerce (tráfico, conversión, AOV, churn, LTV, etc.) para apoyar la toma de decisiones estratégicas.
Integrar y cruzar datos digitales (web/app) con:CRM, paid media y datos transaccionales.
Desarrollar modelos analíticos y predictivos orientados a negocio:Segmentación de clientes, scoring, propensión a compra, forecasting de demanda, etc.
Velar por la calidad del dato, proponiendo mejoras en procesos y fuentes de información.
Preparar y comunicar insights y resultados de manera clara a los distintos stakeholders (Ecommerce, Marketing, Producto, Tech).
Colaborar en iniciativas de experimentación digital (A/B testing) para optimizar funnels, campañas y experiencias de usuario.




✅ Requisitos




Experiencia previa en entornos Ecommerce (retail, moda, marketplaces o similares).
Dominio avanzado de SQL.
Experiencia trabajando con BigQuery y Snowflake.
Dominio avanzado de Power BI (modelado de datos, DAX, visualizaciones).
Nivel avanzado de Excel.
Nivel alto de inglés (entorno internacional, documentación y reuniones).




🌟 Se valorará positivamente




Experiencia en modelos predictivos:Propensión a compra, churn, LTV, forecasting de demanda, recomendación de productos, etc.
Conocimiento de técnicas de machine learning (supervisado y no supervisado).
Experiencia con Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn).
Uso de notebooks (Databricks Notebooks / Jupyter).
Experiencia en A/B testing y experimentación digital.
Uso de herramientas como GrowthBook y Optimizely.
Experiencia trabajando con Azure DevOps y flujos de trabajo colaborativos (versionado, CI/CD de modelos o pipelines).




🧩 Tech Stack




Trabajarás con un stack moderno y orientado a grandes volúmenes de datos:

Data & Cloud: BigQuery, Snowflake, Databricks
Lenguajes: SQL, Python
Reporting & BI: Power BI, Excel
Experimentación: GrowthBook, Optimizely
Colaboración & DevOps: Azure DevOps




🏙 Ubicación & Modelo de trabajo




Posición basada en Cerdanyola del Valles, Barcelona, España.
Se dispone de autobus de empresa.
Presencialidad 2 días a la semana.
Entorno multidisciplinar con fuerte foco en negocio digital, datos y tecnología.




🚀 Por qué unirte a Amaris Consulting




Crecimiento profesional: el 70% de nuestros líderes senior comenzaron en posiciones junior.
Formación continua: acceso a academias internas, formaciones online, webinars y certificaciones patrocinadas por la compañía.
Flexibilidad & beneficios: modelo de trabajo híbrido y paquete competitivo de beneficios sociales (a detallar durante el proceso).
Bienestar: nuestro programa WeCare te acompaña en situaciones críticas.
Desarrollo personal: presupuesto anual de formación para potenciar tus habilidades y acelerar tu carrera.




📅 Fecha de incorporación: ASAP

HTML:
Únete a Amaris Consulting y participa en iniciativas data-driven que impactan a millones de usuarias de moda en todo el mundo. Formarás parte de un grupo internacional, trabajando implant (FTE) en el equipo de Ecommerce en un entorno que valora la innovación, la autonomía y el talento, utilizando un stack de datos real y de última generación.


🎯 Tu Misión & Impacto


Como Data analyst te incorporarás al equipo de Ecommerce para transformar datos en insights accionables, modelos analíticos y recomendaciones estratégicas que impulsen la captación, conversión, venta y retención de clientas, así como la reducción de devoluciones.


Trabajarás mano a mano con stakeholders de negocio digital, CRM, paid media y tecnología, asegurando que las decisiones clave se basen en datos y contribuyendo directamente al crecimiento del canal online.


🛠 Responsabilidades


  • Analizar datos de clientes y comportamiento digital para mejorar:Captación, conversión, venta, fidelización y devoluciones.
  • Diseñar, crear y mantener dashboards y reporting en Power BI para los equipos de Ecommerce y negocio.
  • Definir y hacer seguimiento de KPIs clave de Ecommerce (tráfico, conversión, AOV, churn, LTV, etc.) para apoyar la toma de decisiones estratégicas.
  • Integrar y cruzar datos digitales (web/app) con:CRM, paid media y datos transaccionales.
  • Desarrollar modelos analíticos y predictivos orientados a negocio:Segmentación de clientes, scoring, propensión a compra, forecasting de demanda, etc.
  • Velar por la calidad del dato, proponiendo mejoras en procesos y fuentes de información.
  • Preparar y comunicar insights y resultados de manera clara a los distintos stakeholders (Ecommerce, Marketing, Producto, Tech).
  • Colaborar en iniciativas de experimentación digital (A/B testing) para optimizar funnels, campañas y experiencias de usuario.


✅ Requisitos


  • Experiencia previa en entornos Ecommerce (retail, moda, marketplaces o similares).
  • Dominio avanzado de SQL.
  • Experiencia trabajando con BigQuery y Snowflake.
  • Dominio avanzado de Power BI (modelado de datos, DAX, visualizaciones).
  • Nivel avanzado de Excel.
  • Nivel alto de inglés (entorno internacional, documentación y reuniones).


🌟 Se valorará positivamente


  • Experiencia en modelos predictivos:Propensión a compra, churn, LTV, forecasting de demanda, recomendación de productos, etc.
  • Conocimiento de técnicas de machine learning (supervisado y no supervisado).
  • Experiencia con Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn).
  • Uso de notebooks (Databricks Notebooks / Jupyter).
  • Experiencia en A/B testing y experimentación digital.
  • Uso de herramientas como GrowthBook y Optimizely.
  • Experiencia trabajando con Azure DevOps y flujos de trabajo colaborativos (versionado, CI/CD de modelos o pipelines).


🧩 Tech Stack


Trabajarás con un stack moderno y orientado a grandes volúmenes de datos:

  • Data & Cloud: BigQuery, Snowflake, Databricks
  • Lenguajes: SQL, Python
  • Reporting & BI: Power BI, Excel
  • Experimentación: GrowthBook, Optimizely
  • Colaboración & DevOps: Azure DevOps


🏙 Ubicación & Modelo de trabajo


  • Posición basada en Cerdanyola del Valles, Barcelona, España.
  • Se dispone de autobus de empresa.
  • Presencialidad 2 días a la semana.
  • Entorno multidisciplinar con fuerte foco en negocio digital, datos y tecnología.


🚀 Por qué unirte a Amaris Consulting


  • Crecimiento profesional: el 70% de nuestros líderes senior comenzaron en posiciones junior.
  • Formación continua: acceso a academias internas, formaciones online, webinars y certificaciones patrocinadas por la compañía.
  • Flexibilidad & beneficios: modelo de trabajo híbrido y paquete competitivo de beneficios sociales (a detallar durante el proceso).
  • Bienestar: nuestro programa WeCare te acompaña en situaciones críticas.
  • Desarrollo personal: presupuesto anual de formación para potenciar tus habilidades y acelerar tu carrera.


📅 Fecha de incorporación: ASAP

Title: Data Analyst (m/f/d)
Description:
About Redcare Pharmacy:

As Europe’s No.1 e-pharmacy Redcare Pharmacy is powered by passionate teams and cutting-edge innovation. We strive to create a healthy collaborative work environment where every employee feels valued and inspired to contribute to our vision “Until every human has their health”. If you’re seeking a career that offers purpose and aligns with your values join us and start your #Redcareer today.

About the role:

Redcare Pharmacy is expanding its business activities and is looking for a dedicated and experienced Data Scientist (m/f/d) for the Commercial Operations department. If you're passionate about turning millions of data points into powerful business insights and want to shape the future of one of Europe's leading online pharmacies — this is your chance to make a real impact.

Job Description

About your Tasks


Act as a contact point for CRM and marketing data topics and support stakeholder needs end-to-end
Perform data and business analytics, including customer segmentation, forecasting, and campaign evaluation
Build and maintain data pipelines, reporting structures, and automated reports (R/Python, Excel)
Translate complex data into clear insights and actionable recommendations for commercial teams
Ensure transparent stakeholder communication and close collaboration with CRM and Commercial teams
Contribute to the development of future data infrastructure and tools (e.g. Azure/Databricks/dbt)


Qualifications

About you:


You bring solid experience in Data Science, Data Analytics, or Business Analytics, ideally in a commercial or e-commerce environment
You are confident working with Python, R, SQL, and have experience with reporting and data pipelines
You enjoy working closely with stakeholders and acting as a reliable, transparent communication partner
You have a strong analytical mindset and the ability to translate data into business impact
Experience with CRM or marketing analytics is a strong plus; exposure to tools like Azure/Databricks is beneficial
A background in psychology, biology, or a related analytical field, as well as German language skills, are a plus


Additional Information

About your benefits:

In order to provide you with the best possible support for your individual needs - whether it‘s living a healthy life, having enough time for your family, or developing your skills - we offer a wide range of different, site-specific benefits:


Sports: Stay healthy. Profit from a membership (M) package at Urban Sports Club, so that you can take advantage of a huge variety of sport offers.
Mental Health: Get quick and professional help from psychologists of nilo if you feel overwhelmed in private or professional life. Anonymous and free of charge.
Work from Home: If your job does not require you to be present in the office, we can arrange the place you work from individually - even for up to 20 days a year anywhere in the EU.
Personal development: Grow! We support and encourage your individual development through various in- and external trainings.
Employee discount: You get a 10 % employee discount on all over the counter, beauty and personal care products in our online store & 20 % discount on nu3.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst | Amsterdam




Our client is a fast-growing Dutch SaaS company that lets consumers find and buy insurance through a smart app. With roughly 50 people and ambitions to expand across Europe, they're building out the data team that powers every business decision.




What will you be doing?




Build and own the data model that sits underneath every dashboard, report, and analysis in the company.
Set up and maintain data marts so the business always has clean, ready-to-use data at their fingertips.
Own the numbers - from financial close reports to operational updates - and make sure the right people have the right information at the right time.
Dig into the data for Finance and Insurance: spot patterns before anyone asks, agree on what the key metrics mean, and answer the questions that move decisions forward.




Tech stack

SQL · Python · Databricks · QuickSight · AWS




What do you bring?




3–6 years of experience as a data analyst or in a similar role
Strong SQL & Python skills
Python for data transformation and ad-hoc analysis
Hands-on experience with Databricks
Experience building dashboards (QuickSight, Power BI, Tableau or similar)
Comfortable working independently and owning your output




What's in it for you?

€80,000 - €85,000 gross per year, based on experience
Real ownership - small team, visible impact
Working in an environment where things actually get built




What to expect

The role is office-based in Amsterdam (3 days on-site). They operate in a high-performance environment where you'll be expected to work autonomously, get into the detail when needed, and keep up with a team that moves quickly and changes direction when necessary.




Interested and would you like to hear more? Please send me a direct message on either LinkedIn or email me with your most recent CV to: jan@doghouse-recruitment.nl

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Job Description

Job Description:

The Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and interpreting data to provide actionable insights for business decisions. The role involves creating and managing data pipelines using Airflow for data extraction, processing, and loading, ensuring their maintenance, monitoring, and stability. The analyst will work closely with end-users and other teams to provide accessible and reliable data

Main Tasks


Responsible for creating data pipelines in Airflow for data extracting, processing and loading
Responsible for code and query optimization
Responsible for generating insights and identify trends, anomalies or opportunities to improve users experience and anticipate their daily tasks
Responsible for delivering data in useful and appealing ways to users
Responsible for understanding business change and requirement needs, assess the impact and the cost.


Qualifications

Technical Skills:


Python
Experience in creating APIs in Python
PySpark
SQL, Oracle Data Base
Experience with Data Warehouses
Apache Airflow - Experience in pipeline development
Git
Agile methodologies


Language Skills


English – Practice


Soft Skills


Good communication skills
Strong analytical abilities, able to have the right synthesis and all possible details at same timee required soft skills
Adaptability skills
Team spirit
Client Focus

Title: Data Analyst Junior
Description:
Joining Unlimitail means becoming part of the Retail Media revolution — the marketing lever that is transforming advertising by leveraging data and the digital and physical environments of retailers.




With the ambition to become a leader in Europe and Latin America, Unlimitail helps brands deploy powerful Retail Media strategies and supports retailers in developing their own offers through cutting-edge proprietary technology.




At Unlimitail, you’ll be joining a fast-growing company at the crossroads of data, technological innovation, and digital marketing — reinventing the way brands and retailers connect with consumers.




Role Overview :




Within the Analytics team, your mission will be to participate in the development of Unlimitail’s analytics capabilities. Your environment will be millions of transactional data coming from major retailers on the market to analyze and improve the performance of online and offline marketing campaigns.




As we work with both retailers (providing media inventory) and brands (buying media inventory), you will have the opportunity to gain a deep understanding of the retail media ecosystem.




Your Mission :




You will work with different teams (Ad Operations, Marketing, Sales) in different countries on a wide variety of topics:

Perform ecommerce campaigns analysis to provide detailed insights
Conduct end-to-end ad hoc analysis to help retailers best monetize their inventory
Participate in the design and maintenance of databases, using SQL to store and manage data efficiently
Work on automating data analysis and data visualization capabilities
Work on Unlimitail’s customer lifetime value calculation capability
Participate in the development of new, cutting-edge capabilities to create the best retail media products




What we’re looking for :




Master's degree in Data Analysis, business analytics, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field.
First experience in data analysis
Data Analysis: Proven ability to analyze large datasets, identify trends, and extract actionable insights through the use of strong SQL skills for querying and data extraction.
Programming Languages: Python and SQL mandatory, any other is a plus
Data Visualization: previous experience in creating interactive and insightful visualizations, using tools like Looker is mandatory
Knowledge of GCP environment is a plus
Problem-solving: Adept in approaching analytical problems and proposing effective solutions.
Good communication skills in English. Another language (Spanish, Portuguese) is a plus.
Strong team player with the ability to collaborate effectively




Salary range: €40k - €45k (commensurate with profile)




What’s in it for you :




Work in a fast-paced, international, and innovative environment, at the intersection of data, retail, and media – one of the fastest-growing spaces in digital
A strategic role in a high-growth team with autonomy and impact
A dynamic, supportive environment with smart people and bold ambitions
Office located in the heart of Paris (Sentier district)
A flexible remote work policy of 2 days/week
90% reimbursement of public transportation
10€/day Swile card for each working day, we'll cover 60% of the cost




Ready to make a big impact? Apply now and be part of our innovative journey!

Unlimitail is committed to fostering a diverse workforce and strongly encourages applications from underrepresented groups. We are committed to equality of opportunity and welcome applications from individuals, regardless of their background.

If you have any reasonable adjustment needs arising from a disability or medical condition to fully participate in the recruitment process, please discuss this with the recruiter who contacts you.

Title: Data Analyst H/F
Description:
Au sein du Service Etudes clients & concurrence, nous recherchons un DATA ANALYST H/F en CDI.




Vous contribuez directement à l’optimisation de la performance commerciale des enseignes Intermarché et Netto, grâce à l’analyse et la valorisation de la donnée.




Concrètement, quelles seront vos missions ?




1) Analyse de la performance commerciale :

Recueillir et formaliser les besoins métiers
Définir les méthodologies d’analyse adaptées
Produire des reportings et analyses ad hoc
Automatiser la production et la diffusion des analyses
Accompagner les résultats d’analyses synthétiques et actionnables

2) Développement d’outils data & reporting :

Interroger et structurer les données du SI
Concevoir des tableaux de bord et indicateurs de pilotage
Mettre à disposition des outils pour les équipes métiers
Former les utilisateurs




3) Modélisation et valorisation de la donnée (prévision de ventes, Potentiel de vente, scoring, segmentation…) :

Développer des modèles (prévisions, scoring, segmentation…)
Participer à la gestion de l’industrialiser les résultats dans le SI
Assurer le suivi et la fiabilité des indicateurs




4) Analyses avancées :

Croiser différentes sources de données (caisse, fidélité, panels, géomarketing)
Produire des analyses à forte valeur ajoutée pour le pilotage business




Et si vos compétences venaient nourrir notre mission ?




Vous êtes diplômé(e) d'un Bac+5 en statistiques, data, marketing ou équivalent.
Vous justifiez de 2 à 5 ans d’expérience en analyse de données opérationnelles (clients, ventes, produits, performance commerciale, promotions, …), idéalement en grande distribution.
Maîtrise de SQL, Python (PySpark) et des outils de data visualisation.
Connaissance de Databricks, Alteryx et Power BI appréciée.




Informations supplémentaires :




Poste basé à Bondoufle (91).
Rémunération : fixe + 13ème mois + prime sur objectifs.
Prime d'intéressement & participation.
2 jours de télétravail / semaine, selon nos conditions internes.




Envie de rejoindre les enseignes Intermarché & Netto ? Engagez-vous concrètement dans l’action avec nous pour relever nos défis d'aujourd’hui et de demain ! Parlons-en très vite !

Title: Junior Data Analytics - Transaction Services
Description:
Ubicación:

Madrid, ES, 28046

Fecha de publicación: 20 may 2026

¿Te defines por tu talento y tu visión?

Entonces, tú también puedes marcar la diferencia. Únete a un entorno profesional que contribuye a la transformación de empresas y sociedad. Alcanza tus metas, supera tus límites y únete a una firma que va más allá de los servicios profesionales.

Porque marcar la diferencia no es solo algo que decimos. Es lo que hacemos.

Desarrolla tu carrera con nosotros.

Actualmente nos encontramos en la búsqueda de una persona innovadora para trabajar en el departamento de Deal Advisory – Transaction Services (TS), dentro del equipo de innovación y Data & Analytics interno.

Desde el equipo de TS prestamos servicios de Due Diligence financiara en el contexto de la compra/venta de empresas (Fusiones y adquisiciones), asesorando al comprador o vendedor. Formarás parte de un equipo Joven y dinámico donde el buen ambiente es una máxima. Si te gustan tanto el mundo de las finanzas como el Data Analytics, este es tu sitio! Te encargarás de desarrollar procesos ETL, construir modelos de datos y trabajar en soluciones con Python e inteligencia artificial. Además, diseñarás e implementarás dashboards y participarás en el análisis financiero de proyectos complejos para clientes de distintos sectores.No es necesario contar con conocimientos previos en finanzas o contabilidad: tendrás la oportunidad de adquirirlos aquí!

¿Que podrás hacer?

Desarrollar iniciativas de transformación interna del departamento, utilizando herramientas actuales y desarrollando nuevas soluciones con Python e inteligencia artificial.

Colaborar en proyectos con clientes en todo lo relacionado con gestión de grandes volúmenes de datos, aplicando analítica avanzada (Alteryx, Python).

Diseñar e implementar modelos de datos con Power Query y Power Pivot, así como desarrollar dashboards en Power BI.

¿Que necesitas saber?

Title: Staff Data Analyst
Description:
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

Job Description

We are on the lookout for a Staff Data Analyst to join the Vendor Strategic Programs team.

As part of this team, you will be working on some of the most exciting and strategically critical projects supporting our restaurant partners. For instance, we improve the affordability of millions of dishes on a daily basis, providing actionable insights to optimize the pricing strategy of hundreds of thousands of vendors globally.

As part of our broader Vendor Team, we jointly contribute to the success of both Delivery Hero and thousands of restaurants, shops, and local businesses. Your contribution will empower vendors with advanced tools to manage their operations, boosting their visibility and reach. The insights you create and the improvements you enable will create growth opportunities for businesses of all sizes, strengthening Delivery Hero’s ecosystem and impact.


Work alongside a top team of data scientists, engineers, product managers, and closely with the commercial teams to deliver strategy-defining insights fast and in high-quality
Inform leadership decisions that define how we grow and support our base of 1m+ restaurants in 65+ countries, how we monetize our services and how we provide affordable meals to millions of people every day
Champion a data-driven mindset, guiding leaders and team members on methodology and best practices in leveraging data effectively
Collaborate closely across departments to make the most of our vast company data pool, driving new solutions and enhancing operational efficiency at scale
Engage with local and global teams on a daily basis to deeply understand their requirements, and business priorities, translating them into actionable insights and strategic recommendations


Qualifications

Significant experience as a BI/Data analyst (preferably in e-commerce or fintech) with a degree in statistics, mathematics, economics/business, computer science or an equivalent education and/or relevant practical experience


Expert-level proficiency in SQL (preferably, experience with BigQuery) and data visualization (Tableau and Looker)
Proficiency in analytics engineering tools, incl. Orchestration tools like dbt and Airflow
Experience with data modeling and turning complex data into actionable insights
Passion for data, with creative problem-solving abilities and an eye for detail
You don’t hide behind data and tickets - you demonstrate top-notch business acumen and relentless curiosity to crack complex business challenges with clear recommendations
You thrive being embedded closely with commercial teams as your key counterparts - as our ideal candidate you have a strong commercial background having worked in a business role or equivalent in the past
You are an outstanding team player, able to coordinate cross-functional work teams and excited to handle time-critical challenges and decision ambiguity
You execute fast to deliver value to your global stakeholders without long iteration loops
Excellent English communication skills, both written and oral


Nice to have:


Practical experience working with Git (or similar version control system)
Practical experience with Python
Practical experience in A/B Testing: Experience designing experiments and analyzing results with a solid background in statistics


Additional Information

Ensuring you and all our Heroes are looked after, happy, and healthy is always on the menu. Because if you’re in good shape, then we’re in good shape.


Make the most of our hybrid working model and join the team for face-to-face connection and collaboration in our beautiful Berlin campus 2 days a week
We offer 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service
We will support you in developing yourself and your career growth opportunities: 1.000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support and access to the Udemy Business platform to explore a variety of online courses.
Get moving and release those wonderful, mind-boosting endorphins: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy
Cash. Dough. Cheddar. Whatever you call it, we’ll help you with it: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan
The power of getting together over some food is unrivaled. Here are a few ways to help you do that. All the yum: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts. Courses.
Wondering what relocating to Berlin is like? In this article, we’ve put together 10 things you should know about moving to Berlin and how Delivery Hero can support you. You can also visit our relocation hub and check out more information about moving to Berlin.
Ready to prepare for your interview? Check out the list of the 5 most common interview questions and answers created in collaboration with our recruiters.


Ready to join our team? If you’re excited to grow, collaborate and be part of the world’s leading delivery platform, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today!

We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. Fostering this starts with hiring - therefore we do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses, or any other aspect that makes you, you.

We encourage you to let us know if you need any accommodations or specific accessibility support to ensure a smooth interview experience—just let us know with an email to our Inclusion Officer at inclusion@deliveryhero.com.

Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

You're welcome to share your pronouns (he/she/they) right from the start so we can address you respectfully from our first contact.

Title: Business Data Analyst
HTML:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 27,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.4 billion euros in 2024.

Job Description

Are you passionate about turning data into actionable insights? At Inetum, we are looking for a Business Data Analyst to bridge the gap between data and business, ensuring that information is available to support strategic decisions efficiently.

Key Responsibilities

  • Gather and define business requirements for data initiatives;
  • Extract and analyze data from commercial and analytical systems for ad hoc analysis;
  • Design and structure data models to create valuable products and ensure data consistency;
  • Perform business analysis to support operations and decision-making;
  • Communicate effectively with stakeholders and translate insights into actionable recommendations;
  • Contribute to the evolution of our Data Warehouse and Datahub.

Deliverables

  • Development of dashboards and data visualization strategies;
  • Creation of documents and reports to support decision-making;
  • Compilation of information and preparation of analytical reports;
  • User Stories for Data Warehouse enhancements;
  • Data modeling within the Data Warehouse;
  • Ad hoc data collection from commercial and analytical systems.

Qualifications

  • Up to 10 years of experience in similar roles;
  • Advanced knowledge of SQL for data extraction and manipulation;
  • Strong experience with dashboards and data visualization tools;
  • Advanced Excel and proficiency in Office tools;
  • Preferably experience with SAS Enterprise Guide and DOMO;
  • Solid understanding of data modeling and warehousing concepts.

Title: ALTERNANCE - Assistant Data Analyst F/H
Description:
Poste

From the house of dream to the house of talents

« Quoi que vous fassiez - pour le travail ou le plaisir - faites-le avec passion ! Vivez avec passion... »* Christian Dior

Christian Dior fut le couturier du rêve. Dès la fondation de sa Maison en 1947, marquée par la révolution du New Look, il métamorphose ses songes en de merveilleuses créations. Son esprit visionnaire n’a eu de cesse de magnifier les femmes du monde entier, inspirant aujourd’hui et plus que jamais ses successeurs. « Le tissu est le seul véhicule de nos rêves (…). La mode, en somme, est issue d’un rêve, et le rêve, c’est une évasion », écrivait-il dans son ouvrage Je suis couturier. Au fil de ses collections, Monsieur Dior est devenu le démiurge du bonheur de ses muses.

Aujourd’hui, riche de cet héritage d’exception et d’une communauté de plus de 7 500 talents, notre Maison incarne plus que jamais la Maison des Talents pensé par Christian Dior. Dans plus de 40 pays, nous faisons rayonner notre savoir-faire, notre audace et notre excellence à travers la passion et la créativité de nos collaborateurs. Rejoignez-nous et créez votre avenir dans notre univers généreux, disruptif et ambitieux où nous grandissons dans l’excellence, le courage et l’optimisme.


Le Petit Dictionnaire de la Mode


Missions

DETAIL DE LA MISSION

Contexte

Au sein de l’Analytics Factory (siège Monde), vous assisterez l’équipe dans la production et l’analyse des données clients afin d’aider aux prises de décisions. Vous serez amené à être en contact avec nos interlocuteurs en Zone ainsi que les divisions Produits et équipes Marketing Client, dans le but de les soutenir dans leur suivi client.

Descriptif

En fonction de votre profil, nous pourrons définir une mission principale : réalisation d’un score d’appétence produits, retravailler la segmentation clients actuelle, affiner la définition des clients inactifs pour mettre en place des traitements différenciés, …

En Périphérie De Cette Mission Principale, Vous Participerez à La Production Et à L’analyse Quotidiennes Des Données Clients


Réalisation d’études et d’analyses clients (analyse du comportement d’achat, profils clients, parcours clients, segmentations)
Analyses des performances des produits et des collections (ventes, tendances, recrutement etc.)
Gestion opérationnelle des campagnes marketing : recommandation de ciblage, comptages et créations
Mise en place de tableaux de bord afin de suivre la performance des campagnes (newsletters, mailing…)
Analyse des impacts des différentes actions clientèles monde (événements clients, …)


Profil

De formation Bac+5, type école d’ingénieur ou université spécialisée en statistiques


Dataiku / SQL indispensable
Rigueur, fiabilité et autonomie
Esprit d’équipe
Anglais indispensable


Ce que vous apprendrez au cours de cette alternance :

Vous pourrez développer vos compétences analytiques (lecture de résultats, analyse et communication pertinente des enseignements).

Vous aurez également l’occasion de mettre en application vos compétences statistiques à l’aide notamment de Dataiku, dont vous pourrez de plus améliorer votre maîtrise.

Vous participerez à la vie courante d’un grand groupe de luxe, en découvrirez l’univers et les problématiques clients.

A titre personnel, vous développerez vos compétences relationnelles au contact des différentes équipes en Zone, Marketing Client et des divisions Produit, ainsi que votre rigueur et votre autonomie.

Encourageant l’inclusion et la diversité sous toutes ses formes, Christian Dior Couture s'est engagé depuis 2013 dans une démarche en faveur de l'emploi des personnes en situation de handicap, et de la valorisation de toutes les singularités.

Title: Data Analyst (Product)
Description:
About Revolut




People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.




About the role




Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.




What you'll be doing




Understanding our business and its processes through our data
Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops




What you'll need




Previous experience in an analytical role creating impactful solutions
A background/education in a quantitative discipline
3+ years of experience with SQL
Great skills with Python or other programming languages
Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge







Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.




Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

• Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.

• Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

HTML:
About Revolut


People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.


About the role


Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.


What you'll be doing


  • Understanding our business and its processes through our data
  • Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
  • Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
  • Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
  • Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
  • Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops


What you'll need


  • Previous experience in an analytical role creating impactful solutions
  • A background/education in a quantitative discipline
  • 3+ years of experience with SQL
  • Great skills with Python or other programming languages
  • Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge



Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.


Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

• Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.

• Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

Title: Intern - Digital Data Science and Analytics
Description:
JOIN OUR AMSTERDAM DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE AND ANALYTICS TEAMS!

At adidas, we believe that data is one of the most important resources, that enables us to better understand our consumer, enhance their experience and connect them to their passion. In the Digital Data Science and Digital Analytics teams, we create fact-based insights through a holistic, integrated, and actionable storytelling approach across all relevant digital marketing initiatives to help improve and shape our future digital publishing and media plans, tactics, content strategies and brand narratives.

DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE: The Digital Data Science team at adidas focuses on forecasting and pricing solutions by leveraging advanced Machine Learning models to support buying, planning, and trading decisions. They provide forecasting and price recommendations during key commercial events like Black Friday and seasonal sales periods, with solutions live across the globe.

In parallel, the team is actively evolving toward agentic AI‑powered decision support, building AI trading agents. This includes exposing pricing and forecasting capabilities through intelligent agents, orchestrating model workflows via natural‑language interactions, and embedding governed business context to ensure reliable, explainable outputs.

Operating in an Agile setup, the team collaborates closely with data engineers, ML operations engineers, solution architects, and business teams to experiment with new AI‑native workflows, improve model performance, and translate complex data science solutions into intuitive, self‑service tools for markets.

DIGITAL ANALYTICS: Digital Analytics Team at adidas is responsible for delivering cutting-edge analytics services to internal stakeholders, enabling them to make fact-based decisions. We manage the generation of insights that help adidas understand consumer behavior and performance related analytics to ultimately help drive sales.

DIGITAL PARTNER ANALYTICS: The Digital Partner teamCollaborates with the various Partner and Wholesale teams to capture reporting requirements and support Analytics team to implement these. Support the Analytics team enhancing the backend structure of our performance dashboards. Pro-actively seek for new reporting opportunities to provide our teams additional performance insights.GROW YOUR CAPABILITIES THROUGH MEANINGFUL TASKS & PROJECTS


Project Contribution:Contribute to assigned AI and data science projects, supporting tasks such as model implementation, experimentation workflows, and integration with applications or databases.
Reporting and Best Practices:Support the implementation of reporting structures for communicating model results and data-driven insights. Follow best practices in data science, experimentation, and documentation.
Data Analysis and Visualization:Apply data analysis techniques to explore datasets, perform feature engineering, and support model development. Utilize visualization tools to effectively communicate findings and model outcomes.
Machine Learning & AI:Support the development and implementation of machine learning models by assisting in data preparation, experimentation, and evaluation. Contribute to exploring AI agents, and RAG-based solutions to generate intelligent, scalable insights.
Operationalization and Automation:Assist in automating data workflows, model pipelines, and reporting processes. Support experimentation with modern tools and frameworks for ML deployment and scalable AI solutions.


WHAT WOULD MAKE YOU A MATCH?


Student of Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a structured way of thinking
Initial experience or coursework in machine learning or data science projects
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Hands-on working style with the ability to learn quickly and meet deadlines
Agile, open-minded team player with a passion to connect sports and lifestyle with AI, technology, and innovation
Eagerness to continuously improve oneself and to further develop own skills
Fluent in English
Affinity to digital tools and modern AI frameworks
Strong MS Office skills (especially PowerPoint and Excel)
Proficiency in Python and/or SQL; familiarity with Machine learning/Deep Learning libraries
Exposure to LLMs, RAG, or AI agents is a plus


What's In It For You


Employee discounts on products
Chances to attend and take part in on campus events and sponsored adidas events/games
Structured training and development, access to LinkedIn Learning, Language Training and adidas Learning Portal
Possibility to join our mentorship program, networking opportunities or employee resource groups
International intern community and work environment
Regular development conversations as part of your role
Inspiring campus with canteens, cafes, reflection rooms and sport facilities including an on-site gym (free)
Company events focusing on sports and mental health
Flexible and agile working arrangements (40% home office possible)
Monthly gross allowance: 1.200,00€


ELIGIBILITY


Enrolled as full-time student for the complete duration of the internship
Candidates in penultimate year of study preferred (following the internship, students should have maximum one year to graduate)
Availability for the full duration (6 months) of the internship from September 2026 – January 2027
Local to Amsterdam/Ability to relocate to Amsterdam for the full duration of the internship


KEY FACTS


Start Date: September 1st, 2026
Duration: 5 months
Location: adidas Headquarters in Amsterdam


NEXT STEPS


To apply to the role, please submit your CV. You don't have to write us a motivation letter, but if you have something to say, let us know.
Please apply in the same language as the job description
If we feel like it is a match, you'll be invited to a video interview - don't worry we'll fully brief you on this.


adidas celebrates diversity, supports inclusiveness and encourages individual expression in our workplace. We do not tolerate the harassment or discrimination toward any of our applicants or employees. We are an equal opportunity employer.

Title: Product / Data Analyst
HTML:
HeyBlu is a Romanian e-money licensed fintech company that aims to provide financial services to customers and merchants operating in the e-commerce space. Our vision is to increase the financial power of e-commerce buyers & sellers, making a positive impact in their everyday lives. We do this by extending the purchasing power of retail shoppers in easy and convenient ways, while also helping e-commerce merchants with the capital needed to grow their business.

Being part of eMAG group, the largest e-commerce player in Romania, HeyBlu is focusing on building a financial offering for customers and merchants operating within the eMAG ecosystem by implementing an “embedded finance” approach. As part of the global Prosus group, we share the same purpose: “Improving everyday life for billions of people through technology”. In the HeyBlu team we are building an entrepreneurial, results-driven, agile, and collaborative culture based on the core values we share across the group: ownership, accountability, innovation, adaptability and customer focus.


What you’ll have to do:


  • Build and own the analytics for HeyBlu’s core product areas — conversion funnel, financial data, and transaction performance — so that everyone across product and business works from one clean, reliable source of truth;
  • Design and maintain dashboards with layered views (overall → segmented → deep-dive) that give product managers and business stakeholders instant access to the metrics they need, without a data request queue;
  • Map user behavior funnels end-to-end — from first interaction to completed transaction — and surface the drop-offs, anomalies, and patterns that lead to real product improvements;
  • Use AI tools to automate repeatable analytical work: detecting conversion drops, flagging return rate shifts, or identifying anomalies — so the team can act on issues the same day they appear, not a week later;
  • Support A/B testing initiatives: define success metrics, validate and extract experiment data, check statistical validity, and communicate results clearly to product teams;
  • Work alongside BI and Data Engineering to write queries, improve pipeline reliability, and keep data quality high across all analytical layers;
  • Answer ad-hoc questions from product, commercial, and leadership teams — turning a business question into a well-framed, quick-turnaround analysis;
  • Grow into more advanced analytical work over time: customer segmentation, behavioral modeling, and eventually predictive analytics.


How we’d like you to be:

  • Fluent in SQL: fluent in SQL — you write complex queries without overthinking it and you know how to get to the right answer efficiently, even in messy or multi-layered data structures;
  • Genuinely hands-on with AI tools — not just curious about them but already using them in your work. We want someone who’s found real ways to work smarter with AI;
  • Product-minded: you don’t just answer the data question as written — you ask, “what decision does this enable?” and make sure your output moves something for the team and the product;
  • An owner: you take a topic end-to-end, you check whether the dashboard you built is still useful three months later, and you flag problems before someone else notices them;
  • A fast learner: new tools, new domains, and new tech stacks don’t scare you. You figure things out, and you’re honest about what you don’t know yet;
  • Collaborative: you enjoy working across teams — product, engineering, business — and you know when to ask for a second opinion instead of going in circles alone;
  • Nice to have: experience with product analytics tools like Amplitude or Google Analytics is a bonus — but if you haven’t used them yet, a strong SQL foundation and the right mindset matter more.

Curious to find out more about the next step in your career? Apply now and if your experience is relevant for the role you wish, we will give you a call for more details!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
About MIGx

MIGx is a global consulting company with an exclusive focus on the healthcare and life science industries, with their particularly demanding requirements on quality and regulatory aspects. We have been managing challenges and solving problems for our clients in the areas of compliance, business processes and many others.




MIGx interdisciplinary teams from Switzerland, Spain and Georgia have been taking care of projects in the fields of M&A, Integration, Application, Data Platforms, Processes, IT management, Digital transformation, Managed services and compliance.




About the profile

We are looking for a data enthusiast who likes to play with structured and unstructured data, organize it and create useful dashboards for taking insights and value for it.







Project Description

We’re looking for a Data Analyst to join our Data and AI Engineering team. This role is ideal for those who are passionate about transforming raw data into actionable insights, uncovering patterns that drive business decisions, and building data-driven narratives that matter.




You'll work with cross-functional teams to design analytics solutions, create compelling visualizations, and support evidence-based decision-making across life sciences projects. Whether you're analysing clinical trial data, operational metrics, or business performance, we welcome analysts who thrive in collaborative, curiosity-driven environments and can translate complex datasets into clarity




What You’ll Do

Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports in Power BI that provide clear insights to stakeholders and support data-driven decision-making.
Build ETL pipelines and data transformations using Python to prepare and process structured and unstructured data.
Analyse large datasets to identify trends, anomalies, patterns, and opportunities for optimisation or improvement.
Collaborate with Data Engineers and Business Stakeholders to understand analytical requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
Create reusable data models and calculationsin Power BI and supporting data infrastructure to enable self-service analytics.
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis using Python (pandas, NumPy, SciPy, scikit-learn).
Document data lineage, assumptions, and methodologies to ensure transparency and reproducibility in analytical work.
Support data quality initiatives, identify data issues, and collaborate on data governance improvements.
Present findings and recommendations to technical and non-technical audiences with clarity and impact.
Apply good practices around testing, version control, and documentation for analytical code and models.




What We’re Looking For

We’re committed to building a skilled and diverse engineering team. If you care deeply about writing clean code, delivering resilient systems, and collaborating across disciplines — this role is for you.







Requirements - Must have

Hands-on experience with Power BI: creating dashboards, reports, measures, and data models (DAX knowledge preferred).
Solid proficiency in Python for data analysis and manipulation (pandas, NumPy, matplotlib/seaborn for visualization).
Experience with SQL for querying and manipulating relational databases.
Demonstrable data-driven mindset: ability to ask the right questions, validate assumptions, and support decisions with evidence.
Experience working with structured and unstructured data in analytical contexts.
Comfortable with exploratory data analysis and using statistical techniques to uncover insights.
Understanding of data visualization principles and ability to communicate insights clearly to diverse audiences.
Team-first mindset and experience in agile environments (Scrum or Kanban).
Professional working proficiency in English (our internal and client-facing working language).







Requirements - Nice to have

Experience with clinical trial data, healthcare analytics, or regulated industry datasets.
Familiarity with advanced Python libraries (scikit-learn, statsmodels) for statistical modeling and machine learning.
Knowledge of Git/version control for collaborative analytics projects.
Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP) and cloud-native analytics tools.
Exposure to agile analytics methodologies or analytics engineering principles.
Background with data governance, data quality frameworks, or master data management.
Understanding of GxP compliance, or other regulated industry standards.
Experience with Tableau, Looker, or other BI platforms (transferable skills welcome).
Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric for end-to-end analytics and data platform solutions.
Spanish and/or Catalan language skills.







Languages

English – B2 / C1
Local languages are a plus










What we offer:

Hybrid work model and flexible working schedule that would suit night owls and early birds
25 holiday days per year
Possibilities of career development and the opportunity to shape the company future
An employee-centric culture directly inspired by employee feedback - your voice is heard, and your perspective encouraged
Different training programs to support your personal and professional development
Work in a fast growing, international company
Friendly atmosphere and supportive Management team

Title: Data & Analytics Analyst
Description:
Oliver Wyman, a Marsh (NYSE: MRSH) business, is a management consulting firm driven by deep industry insight, bold innovation, and a collaborative approach that cuts through complexity to help organizations navigate their most defining transformative moments.







The Opportunity:




The Data and Analytics Analyst will be responsible for creating and maintaining reporting artifacts (dashboards and reports) connected to the operations of Oliver Wyman. Our ideal candidate not only understands the technical sides of reporting but is passionate about the field of analytics where they can use their problem-solving skills and creativity to uncover the “Why” for the analysis.




***PLEASE SUBMIT CVs IN ENGLISH***







Key Responsibilities:




Partner with business stakeholders to define their reporting and analytics needs and develop solutions for delivering against them
Assist in development and delivery of new data sets, metrics and analytics content to support business strategic decisions.
Assist with the identification and deployment of efficiencies and enhancements in reporting and analytics
Assist with the development, training and support of the “analytics community” to ensure awareness and proficiency on tools and available data models
Provide support and expertise in data and analytics (data sourcing, data preparation and data visualization) to the various analytics teams in their efforts to convert their offline reporting models to the technologies available as part of the data and analytics initiative.
Partner with technology groups (data architects) to define data requirements for business intelligence visualizations and tools
Participate in the on-going development of the business intelligence and data warehousing functions within the wider organization







Experience Required:




Bachelors / MS in a quantitative discipline e.g., applied mathematics, statistics, computer science, information systems, econometrics, or related field
3+ years of experience in business analytics and business support functions
3+ years of experience working with Tableau software to design, develop, and deploy business dashboards (Tableau Desktop, Tableau Server and Tableau Data Prep.)
3+ years of SQL/PLSQL development experience
Experience in managing/maintaining Tableau sites and projects ensuring a consistent design, deployment, and maintenance process is followed.
Experience in Agile delivery methodology in a data and analytics context
Deep understanding of data warehouse processes, dimensional modeling and ETL/Integration
Knowledge of industry standard Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as: Oracle (OBIEE), Business Objects, etc.
Experience with statistical programming (R, SAS, and/or Python), a plus
Experience with multiple RMDB’s such as SQL Server, Oracle
Strong Excel, PowerPoint skills
English fluency (written and spoken) required







Skills and Attributes:




Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking skills required
Ability to drive exploration and draw conclusions from multiple data sets
Strong spirit of innovation, self-starter, independent, and with ability to come up with solutions to meet business problems
Self-directed who can interpret data to understand trends and derive meaningful business insights for senior executives with little oversight
Self-motivated with ability to work independently while also enjoying collaboration with cross-functional teams and other analysts
Strong desire to learn new skills and pass knowledge acquired onto others
Keen attention to detail with deep quantitative and analytical skills and demonstrated capacity to solve problems and enhance reporting
Strong relationship building skills and ability to build alignment among customers and key stakeholders with demonstrated experience influencing without authority
Ability to work effectively in a fast paced, deadline driven, highly dynamic atmosphere and react quickly to changes and shifting priorities.
Effective communication skills and ability to translate numbers into a story
You need to be curious by nature, understand how data is produced in our various underlying systems and how reporting and analytics content is compiled so that data can be turned into actionable business insights to support the firm’s strategy.







At Oliver Wyman, a Marsh (NYSE: MRSH) business, we bring deep industry insight, bold innovation, and a collaborative approach that cuts through complexity to help organizations navigate their most defining transformative moments.




As a business of Marsh, we work alongside the world’s leading experts across risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting. Together with Marsh Risk, Guy Carpenter, and Mercer, we help organizations build resilience and competitive advantages from every angle. With annual revenue over $24 billion and more than 90,000 colleagues in 130 countries, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective.

For more information, visit oliverwyman.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.

  • 3+ years of experience in business analytics and business support functions
  • 3+ years of experience working with Tableau software to design, develop, and deploy business dashboards (Tableau Desktop, Tableau Server and Tableau Data Prep.)
  • 3+ years of SQL/PLSQL development experience
  • Experience in managing/maintaining Tableau sites and projects ensuring a consistent design, deployment, and maintenance process is followed.
  • Experience in Agile delivery methodology in a data and analytics context
  • Deep understanding of data warehouse processes, dimensional modeling and ETL/Integration
  • Knowledge of industry standard Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as: Oracle (OBIEE), Business Objects, etc.
  • Experience with statistical programming (R, SAS, and/or Python), a plus
  • Experience with multiple RMDB’s such as SQL Server, Oracle
  • Strong Excel, PowerPoint skills
  • English fluency (written and spoken) required



Skills and Attributes:


  • Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking skills required
  • Ability to drive exploration and draw conclusions from multiple data sets
  • Strong spirit of innovation, self-starter, independent, and with ability to come up with solutions to meet business problems
  • Self-directed who can interpret data to understand trends and derive meaningful business insights for senior executives with little oversight
  • Self-motivated with ability to work independently while also enjoying collaboration with cross-functional teams and other analysts
  • Strong desire to learn new skills and pass knowledge acquired onto others
  • Keen attention to detail with deep quantitative and analytical skills and demonstrated capacity to solve problems and enhance reporting
  • Strong relationship building skills and ability to build alignment among customers and key stakeholders with demonstrated experience influencing without authority
  • Ability to work effectively in a fast paced, deadline driven, highly dynamic atmosphere and react quickly to changes and shifting priorities.
  • Effective communication skills and ability to translate numbers into a story
  • You need to be curious by nature, understand how data is produced in our various underlying systems and how reporting and analytics content is compiled so that data can be turned into actionable business insights to support the firm’s strategy.



At Oliver Wyman, a Marsh (NYSE: MRSH) business, we bring deep industry insight, bold innovation, and a collaborative approach that cuts through complexity to help organizations navigate their most defining transformative moments.


As a business of Marsh, we work alongside the world’s leading experts across risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting. Together with Marsh Risk, Guy Carpenter, and Mercer, we help organizations build resilience and competitive advantages from every angle. With annual revenue over $24 billion and more than 90,000 colleagues in 130 countries, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective.

For more information, visit oliverwyman.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.

Title: Data analyst - secteur industrie H/F
HTML:
Viveris est un groupe de conseil et d'ingénierie spécialisé dans la conduite et la réalisation de projets dans les domaines de l'informatique et de l'électronique.

S'engager avec Viveris, c'est l'assurance de relever des défis techniques et humains tout en travaillant sur des projets innovants dans un environnement collaboratif et solidaire.

Contexte de la mission :

Au sein d'un grand groupe industriel international, vous intervenez sur des activités de support opérationnel liées à la qualité des données Produits et Pricing dans un environnement SAP.

La mission consiste à analyser les anomalies détectées, garantir la cohérence des données entre les différents systèmes et appliquer les processus de gouvernance en place.
Vous serez en interaction avec les équipes métiers afin d'améliorer la qualité des référentiels et la bonne application des politiques commerciales.


Responsabilités :

- Analyser les contrôles de qualité des données (Data Quality Checks) relatifs aux domaines Produits et Pricing ;
- Identifier les anomalies et mettre en oeuvre les actions correctives conformément aux processus de gouvernance en vigueur ;
- Assurer la cohérence des données entre les différents systèmes d'information ;
- Participer au traitement et au suivi des flux de données, notamment via les mécanismes d'intégration SAP ;
- Collaborer avec les équipes métiers afin d'améliorer la qualité des référentiels produits et la bonne application des politiques tarifaires ;
- Contribuer à la résolution des incidents de production et au maintien de la qualité de service.

Profil recherché :

- Formation supérieur Bac+5 en informatique, systèmes d'information ou domaine équivalent ;
- Expérience sur des activités de support applicatif, qualité des données ou gestion de référentiels dans un environnement SAP ;
- Soft skills attendues : Rigueur et sens de l'analyse ; Capacité à investiguer et résoudre des anomalies ; Aisance relationnelle et esprit de collaboration.


Compétences techniques :

- SAP (ERP) ;
- Gestion des données de référence (Master Data) ;
- Data Quality / Contrôle de données ;
- Gestion des flux IDoc ;
- Support applicatif / RUN ;
- Anglais professionnel (écrit et oral).


Nos avantages :

- Rémunération attractive et évolutive ;
- Mutuelle familiale à garantie haute ;
- Tickets restaurant pris en charge à 60% ;
- 100% du titre de transport urbain remboursé ;
- 2 jours de télétravail par semaine ;
- Formation continue avec Linkedin Learning et nos communautés techniques.
Ref : 29741100

Inserimento e aggiornamento dati nei sistemi aziendali;

Contratto di apprendistato;

Orario di lavoro full time, 40 ore settimanali;

Affiancamento e supporto operativo.
